---
title: "Park and Ride Analysis"
date: today
server: shiny

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
# get data and load standard data processing
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(tidyverse)
source("park_and_ride_processing_2023.R")

hts_source <- "Puget Sound Regional Council (PSRC) 2017-2025 Household Travel Survey"

```


```{r}
#| panel: sidebar

selectInput('trip', 'Trip ID', all_pnr_trips_est$trip_id)
uiOutput("google_button")
```

```{r}
#| panel: fill

# print variable description

leafletOutput("manual_select")
```

```{r}
DT::DTOutput("var_description")
```


```{r}
#| context: server

locations_all_pnr_times <- readRDS("locations_all_pnr_times.rds")
all_pnr_trips_est <- readRDS("all_pnr_trips_est.rds")

pnr_centroids <- readRDS("pnr_centroids.rds")
pnr_centroids_ll <- sf::st_transform(pnr_centroids, 4326)


selectedTrip <- reactive({
  all_pnr_trips_est[all_pnr_trips_est$trip_id == input$trip,]
  })
selectedTripTrace <- reactive({
  locations_all_pnr_times[locations_all_pnr_times$trip_id == input$trip,]
})


output$var_description <- DT::renderDT(
  selectedTrip() |> 
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("trip_id","depart_datetime","arrive_datetime","EditNotes","origin_purpose","dest_purpose",
             "mode_class","mode_acc","mode_egr"))) |>
    dplyr::mutate(depart_datetime = as.character(depart_datetime)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(arrive_datetime = as.character(arrive_datetime)), 
      
  rownames = FALSE,
  selection = 'none', 
  options = list(ordering = F, dom = 't')
)

output$manual_select <- leaflet::renderLeaflet({

  trip <- selectedTrip()
  trace <- selectedTripTrace()

  leaflet::leaflet(pnr_centroids_ll) |>

    leaflet::addProviderTiles(
      leaflet::providers$CartoDB.Positron,
      group = "Positron (minimal)"
    ) |>

    # Park-and-ride lots
    leaflet::addCircleMarkers(
      stroke = FALSE,
      radius = 4,
      fillColor = "red",
      fillOpacity = 0.6,
      popup = ~paste(
        "<b>Lot:</b>", EditNotes,
        "<br><b>Junction ID:</b>", PSRCjunctID
      )
    ) |>

    # Selected trip trace
    leaflet::addCircleMarkers(
      lng = trace$lon,
      lat = trace$lat,
      stroke = FALSE,
      radius = 3,
      fillColor = "blue",
      fillOpacity = 0.5,
      popup = paste(
        "<b>Collected Time:</b>",
        trace$collect_time_pdt,
        "<br><b>Trip ID:</b>",
        trace$trip_id
      )
    ) |>

    # trip destination
    leaflet::addAwesomeMarkers(
      lng = trip$dest_lng,
      lat = trip$dest_lat,
      icon = leaflet::awesomeIcons(markerColor = "red", icon = "location"),
      popup = paste(
        "<b>Destination Purpose:</b>",
        trip$dest_purpose,
        "<br><b>Trip Mode:</b>",
        trip$mode_class,
        "<br><b>Trip ID:</b>",
        trip$trip_id
      )
    ) |>

    # trip origin
    leaflet::addAwesomeMarkers(
      lng = trip$origin_lng,
      lat = trip$origin_lat,
      icon = leaflet::awesomeIcons(markerColor = "darkblue", icon = "location"),
      popup = paste(
        "<b>Origin Purpose:</b>",
        trip$origin_purpose,
        "<br><b>Trip Mode:</b>",
        trip$mode_class,
        "<br><b>Trip ID:</b>",
        trip$trip_id
      )
    )
})

output$google_button <- renderUI({

  trip <- selectedTrip()

  origin <- paste0(trip$origin_lat[1], ",", trip$origin_lng[1])
  dest   <- paste0(trip$dest_lat[1], ",", trip$dest_lng[1])

  url <- paste0(
    "https://www.google.com/maps/dir/",
    URLencode(origin),
    "/",
    URLencode(dest)
  )

  tags$a(
    href = url,
    target = "_blank",
    class = "btn btn-primary",
    icon("route"),
    " Directions"
  )
})

```
